name: team_task_update
description: Update mutable fields on an existing task. Use this to refine a task's definition, reassign it to a different agent, adjust priority or deadlines, or attach additional metadata. Only provided fields will be updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to update

agent_id.description: ID of the agent to assign or reassign this task to

estimated_duration.description: Updated estimated time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '2 hours')

metadata.description: Updated metadata object; merged with existing metadata

examples.name: Update task priority and assign to agent

parameters.description: Updated scope: also include integration tests for the token refresh endpoint
